sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_maps AS SELECT mapConcat(map('key1', 1), map('key2', 2)) AS concatenated_map;
INSERT INTO test_maps SELECT mapConcat(map('key3', 3), map('key4', 4));
UPDATE test_maps SET concatenated_map = mapConcat(concatenated_map, map('key5', 5)) WHERE concatenated_map['key4'] = 4;
SELECT concatenated_map, concatenated_map['key1'], concatenated_map['key3'] FROM test_maps;
SELECT mapConcat(map('key1', 1, 'key2', 2), map('key1', 3, 'key2', 4)) AS combined_map, combined_map['key1'], combined_map['key2'];
